rows.label: qev010201_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ah—this is troubling.
Why is everyone here so stingy?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0002
rows.name:
Giving up one or two Doll parts—
or even ten or twenty—wouldn't hurt them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0003
rows.name: Don't you agree?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev010201_SEL0011
rows.name:
Agree that Doll parts are expensive and
should be made cheaper.

rows.label: qev010201_JNK0020
rows.name: Disagree

rows.label: qev010201_SEL0021
rows.name:
Disagree, stating that common sense dictates
they wouldn't just give them to a civilian.

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0004
rows.name:
It seems you stand apart from the
inflexible people around here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0005
rows.name:
With humanity's survival on the line,
the people at the Arms Company are still
only thinking about turning a profit—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0006
rows.name: It's an incredibly unpleasant attitude.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0007
rows.name:
Plus, I'd like them to lower the prices AND
allow me to buy on credit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0008
rows.name: You're jumping to conclusions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0009
rows.name:
I wasn't asking for them for free, just to put them
on a tab, but they flat-out refused.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Besides, while I do want Doll parts,
I'm not actually going to use them for a Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0011
rows.name:
I have a grand plan—
There's a machine I absolutely must repair.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0012
rows.name:
Once that machine is operational,
I'll be raking in the cash.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0013
rows.name:
I'd be able to pay back the cost of some Doll parts
in two or three days easily.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0014
rows.name: —Ah, I shouldn't talk too much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0015
rows.name:
Regardless, meeting a BLADE like you here
must be fate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0016
rows.name:
In that case, I don't need high-end goods
like Doll parts—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0017
rows.name:
Could you gather the materials I need
to repair my machine instead?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0018
rows.name: I'll pay you back once I strike it rich, of course.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0019
rows.name: I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0020
rows.name: How is your progress?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0021
rows.name: Both items should be obtainable in Gensho no Kouya.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0022
rows.name:
I'll just be here staring at the inflexible folks
from Arms until you bring the requested items.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0023
rows.name: I've been waiting—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0024
rows.name: Did you manage to gather the requested items?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0025
rows.name:
Thank you.
This is more than enough.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0026
rows.name: I should be able to repair the machine perfectly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0027
rows.name: With this, I'll make a fortune and become filthy rich for sure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0028
rows.name:
I can't pay you a reward right now, but I definitely will
the next time we meet—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010201_MSG0029
rows.name: Thank you so much.[ST:wait ]
